category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Myanmar EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入缅甸：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入緬甸：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Myanmar MSTRD conformity, MIC import permit, MPT radio, MEPE and ESE grid, connector, safety, EMC, and market-access expectations.
description.zh: 公益性对照中国电动汽车充电桩文件与缅甸 MSTRD 合格性、MIC 进口许可、MPT 无线电、MEPE 和 ESE 电网、接口、安全、EMC 及市场准入预期的差距。
description.zht: 公益性對照中國電動汽車充電樁文件與緬甸 MSTRD 合格性、MIC 進口許可、MPT 無線電、MEPE 和 ESE 電網、接口、安全、EMC 及市場准入預期的差距。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, investment approval, grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, installers, and charge-point operators should verify current Myanmar standards, import permit rules, radio approval, grid conditions, customs practice, and local installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、投资批准、并网批准、电气安装设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、安装方和充电运营商在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验缅甸现行标准、进口许可、无线电审批、电网条件、海关实践及当地安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、投資批准、併網批准、電氣安裝設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、安裝方和充電運營商在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗緬甸現行標準、進口許可、無線電審批、電網條件、海關實務及當地安裝要求。

answer_first.en: Myanmar entry is mainly an import, conformity-document, grid, radio, and installation acceptance exercise rather than an EU-style CE or RoHS regime. Key gaps for Chinese GB/T chargers are MSTRD documentation, MIC commercial import permits, MPT approval for wireless modules, MEPE or ESE grid acceptance, local 230 V 50 Hz supply assumptions, and connector adaptation for the installed site.
answer_first.zh: 缅甸准入主要是进口、合格性文件、电网、无线电和安装验收事项，而不是欧盟式 CE 或 RoHS 制度。中国 GB/T 充电桩的主要差距是 MSTRD 文件、MIC 商业进口许可、无线模块的 MPT 审批、MEPE 或 ESE 电网接纳、当地 230 V 50 Hz 供电假设，以及按安装地点适配接口。
answer_first.zht: 緬甸准入主要是進口、合格性文件、電網、無線電和安裝驗收事項，而不是歐盟式 CE 或 RoHS 制度。中國 GB/T 充電樁的主要差距是 MSTRD 文件、MIC 商業進口許可、無線模組的 MPT 審批、MEPE 或 ESE 電網接納、當地 230 V 50 Hz 供電假設，以及按安裝地點適配接口。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
